title: How many Evangelion TV Subs are there
display_title: How many Evangelion TV Subs are there
wikitext:
[]: How many Evangelion TV Subs are there             Quote Post by xPearse » Fri Jul 21, 2017 11:21 am This has probably been asked before, but I was just wondering, how many different sets of English subs are there for Evangelion TV? I know there are a few, but I have no clue where to start.

[]: Re: How many Evangelion TV Subs are there             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jul 21, 2017 11:32 am An arbitrary number, as many people have taken their favourite bits from several and possibly added their own phrases, and I think it's probably now impossible to untangle which are true independent originals to count or how many people/groups made significant contributions. That's not meant to be dismissive - I really think the question can't be answered.

[]: Re: How many Evangelion TV Subs are there             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 21, 2017 1:20 pm These are the ones I know about: - Literal translation project (not actually formatted into subtitles) - ADV: VHS - ADV: DVD (Collection) - ADV: DVD (Platinum) - A2000A (Renewal)

[]: Re: How many Evangelion TV Subs are there             Quote Post by xPearse » Wed Jul 26, 2017 3:59 am Reichu wrote: These are the ones I know about: - Literal translation project (not actually formatted into subtitles) - ADV: VHS - ADV: DVD (Collection) - ADV: DVD (Platinum) - A2000A (Renewal)

[]: Re: How many Evangelion TV Subs are there             Quote Post by Mjolnir Mark IV » Thu Aug 10, 2017 10:10 am xPearse wrote: I would have thought that somebody would have went over the TV show and actually made a sub file for the Literal translation project or at least went over the show and fixed things up from the ADV release.
